question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the Reactor Mono.block() call in streamFileProvider.get().block() to block indefinitely (no timeout configured at the Mono level), holding a thread from the bounded elastic scheduler pool and eventually starving all other reactive pipelines?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the CutoverServiceImpl to call recordDownloaderProperties.setEnabled(false) and blockProperties.setEnabled(true) simultaneously, but the network partition prevents block stream downloads too, resulting in both streams being in an inconsistent enabled state with no data flowing?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the pathRefreshInterval (10s) to expire while the partition is active, causing the path type detection (AUTO mode) to fail and reset to a wrong PathType, so that after the partition heals, files are downloaded from incorrect bucket paths?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isWriteFiles()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that interrupts the Utility.archiveFile() call when writeFiles=true, leaving a zero-byte or truncated record file in the archive directory that is later mistakenly treated as a valid processed file, causing the importer to skip re-downloading it?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer to miss exactly one record file in a 500ms window, and since there is no gap detection in the polling loop, the importer silently advances past the missing file, causing the mirror node to serve incomplete transaction history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the CommonDownloaderProperties timeout (30s) to fire for all 25 nodes in a batch simultaneously, generating 25 concurrent timeout exceptions that overwhelm the error handling logic and cause an unhandled exception that kills the download scheduler thread?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that prevents the importer from writing to the database, causing the streamFileNotifier.verified() call to fail, which leaves lastStreamFile pointing to a file that was never actually persisted, causing duplicate processing or data corruption when the partition heals?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the cloud storage provider to return stale cached responses (HTTP 200 with old data) instead of errors, causing the importer to process outdated record files and corrupt the mirror node's view of the current ledger state?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that prevents the RecordFileRepository.findLatest() call in CutoverServiceImpl from completing, causing the cutover threshold timer to expire and switch to BLOCK stream while record stream is still the only valid source, resulting in a complete data ingestion halt?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer to download signature files from some nodes but not others within a single 500ms batch, causing the consensusRatio check to fail with an insufficient number of verified signatures, and since there is no retry for the current batch, the importer skips to the next batch and permanently loses that record file?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isPersistBytes()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the sidecar download (downloadSidecars) to fail after the main record file has already been committed to the database, resulting in a record file in the database with missing sidecar data that cannot be recovered without re-processing?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer's 500ms polling loop to fire 120 times per minute against a partitioned S3 endpoint, generating 120 failed AWS SDK requests per minute that each create a new HTTP client connection attempt, exhausting the OS file descriptor limit and crashing the JVM?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the CommonDownloaderProperties.init() PostConstruct method to throw an IllegalArgumentException (bucketName validation failure) during a restart triggered by the partition, preventing the importer from starting at all after the partition heals?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer to restart (via liveness probe failure), and upon restart with an empty lastStreamFile, the importer re-downloads and re-processes all record files since startDate, causing duplicate database entries and data corruption?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the Flux.fromIterable(recordFile.getSidecars()) reactive pipeline in downloadSidecars to hang indefinitely on .block(), holding the download thread and preventing the next 500ms polling cycle from executing?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the CutoverService.getLastRecordFile() to return an empty Optional (because the database is unreachable), causing the cutoverService.getLastRecordFile().ifPresent() call to skip the lastStreamFile sync, resulting in the importer re-downloading already-processed files after the partition heals?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the cloud storage bucket to return HTTP 429 (rate limit) responses on every 500ms poll, and since there is no rate-limit-aware backoff in the frequency configuration, the importer continues hammering the endpoint at 500ms intervals, worsening the rate limiting and extending the effective partition duration?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isWriteSignatures()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes signature archival (writeSignatures=true) to write signatures from a minority of nodes before failing, leaving an on-disk signature set that appears complete but represents only a subset of nodes, which could be used to forge a false consensus claim?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer to fail to download the record file for a specific consensus timestamp, and since the 500ms scheduler advances to the next file without gap detection, the mirror node permanently serves a response of 'not found' for transactions in that missing file?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the pathRefreshInterval (10s) to trigger a path type re-detection while the partition is active, causing the AUTO path type to fall back to ACCOUNT_ID when the actual bucket uses NODE_ID paths, resulting in all subsequent downloads targeting wrong paths even after the partition heals?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer's Spring Boot health indicator to report DOWN, triggering an automated infrastructure response (e.g., load balancer removal) that routes all mirror node API traffic to a secondary instance that is also partitioned, causing a complete service outage?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer to accumulate a backlog of unprocessed record files, and when the partition heals, the 500ms polling frequency is insufficient to catch up with real-time production, causing the mirror node to serve increasingly stale data indefinitely?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the RecordFileDownloader.shouldDownload() method (which always returns true) to allow download attempts even when the underlying network is partitioned, causing the importer to waste resources on guaranteed-to-fail download attempts with no circuit breaker?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the importer to fail to download a record file containing a critical system file update (e.g., address book update at file 0.0.101), causing the importer to operate with a stale address book indefinitely and accept signatures from decommissioned nodes?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: isPersistBytes()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes the database connection to drop mid-transaction when persistBytes=false, resulting in a record file being marked as processed in the importer's in-memory state but not committed to the database, causing a permanent gap in the database that is never re-downloaded?
